race.comment: The scratching of ROYAL BOTANIC leaves the door open for POSHY'S GIRL (9) who made it two placings from as many runs when she battled on well for second last time out over 1300m at Newcastle. Handled the heavy on debut at Coffs Harbour. Back in class and draws a nice gate so it is hard to find a weakness. KIWI HARMONY (8) lined up for the third different stable this prep when a closing second in heavy conditions over 1006m at Port Macquarie recently. That run followed a seven-week break so she strips fitter and will appreciate the longer journey today. TENNANT CREEK (12) debuts. Decent effort in a recent Gosford trial. Respect any push in betting. SAHARA SPLASH (11) is back from a five-month spell. Wasn't all that far away at her last couple of runs before the break. Top four aspirations. Doubt the others can make any waves.
